concerns.text: The 'CFI (parquet)' dataset (https://huggingface.co/datasets/cfilt/iitb-english-hindi/resolve/main/data/test-00000-of-00001.parquet) is cited as a fallback for data loading tests. This dataset contains English-Hindi translation pairs, not cognitive flexibility metrics (reaction times, error counts). Using this for 'data loading tests' is inappropriate as the schema and data types (text strings vs. numeric metrics) do not match the TaskPerformance entity defined in data-model.md, risking pipeline failure or silent data corruption during validation.

The plan relies on the 'J6-CFI-HQ-20K' dataset for 'Primary source for task performance metrics'. While the URL is reachable, the dataset name implies a specific cognitive flexibility index. The plan must verify that this specific HuggingFace dataset actually contains the required 'switch/repeat' trial structure and reaction time/error count columns defined in the data-model.md. If the dataset only provides aggregate scores or a different task paradigm, it cannot serve as the primary source for the 'switch cost' calculation required by FR-002.
